description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The front face features three evenly spaced drawers, each equipped with a pair of small, metallic bar handles, and the drawer faces are a light wood tone. The top, sides, and back of the cabinet are finished in a matte black color, providing a striking contrast to the lighter drawer fronts. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The overall construction appears to be a combination of wood or engineered wood for the main body and metal for the handles and internal drawer mechanisms. This piece is suitable for storing documents or small items and would fit well in an urban office or home environment.
description: A small, modern filing cabinet with three light wood drawers and black sides, featuring metal bar handles and short legs. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for office or home use.
description_view_0: Front view showing three light wood drawers with metal bar handles and the black top and legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid black side panel and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, flat black back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the solid black side panel seen in view 1.
